Class Trigger

Namespace
QuartzRestApi.Wrappers
Assembly
QuartzRestApi.dll

Class used to create or read json to get a trigger with a job key and data map

public class Trigger : JobKeyWithDataMap

Makes this object and sets all it's needed properties

public Trigger(TriggerKey triggerKey, string description, string calendarName, string cronSchedule, DateTimeOffset? nextFireTimeUtc, DateTimeOffset? previousFireTimeUtc, DateTimeOffset startTimeUtc, DateTimeOffset? endTimeUtc, DateTimeOffset? finalFireTimeUtc, int priority, JobKey jobKey, JobDataMap jobDataMap)

Parameters

triggerKey TriggerKey

The TriggerKey

description string

A description for the Trigger

calendarName string

The name of the calendar to use or null when not

cronSchedule string

The cron schedule

nextFireTimeUtc DateTimeOffset?

The next fire time in UTC format

previousFireTimeUtc DateTimeOffset?

The previous fire time in UTC format

The start time in UTC format

The end time in UTC format

priority int
